# daytona_authenticated_runner_sandboxes (Data Source)

Reads sandboxes assigned to the authenticated Daytona runner.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "daytona_authenticated_runner_sandboxes" "example" {
  states                     = "started,stopped"
  skip_reconciling_sandboxes = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `request_organization_id` (String) Daytona organization ID to send as `X-Daytona-Organization-ID`.
- `skip_reconciling_sandboxes` (Boolean) Whether sandboxes whose current state differs from desired state should be skipped.
- `states` (String) Comma-separated list of sandbox states to include.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Data source identifier.
- `items` (Attributes List) Returned Daytona sandboxes assigned to the authenticated runner. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items))

<a id="nestedatt--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) Daytona sandbox ID.
- `name` (String) Sandbox name.
- `state` (String) Current sandbox state.
